front_doors.title: Framework Mapping
front_doors.summary: Inspect package boundaries, dependency layers, and downstream impact before proposing framework changes.

front_doors.title: Tool Scaffolding
front_doors.summary: Route new tool and handler work through the canonical module, handler, and registration patterns.

front_doors.title: Package Testing
front_doors.summary: Start with the narrowest package-level checks, then expand to broader framework validation only when justified.

front_doors.title: Issue Work
front_doors.summary: Separate the fix plan, compatibility risk, and verification scope before changing framework behavior.

front_doors.title: Go API Reference
front_doors.summary: Use the typed Go reference skill when the work is about handler signatures, registries, middleware, or package contracts.

front_doors.title: Go Conventions Review
front_doors.summary: Use the shared Go conventions skill for repo-wide review, style, and implementation hygiene.
